contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Standardize Mission stat-card icons — color photo → B&W rainforest SVG
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse_shop_beta/pull/105
  
  Details:
  agroverse.shop/index.html Mission section had three stat-card icons, but only one (Grower network 186+) rendered in color — a 10.75 MB photo of Brazilian rainforest being downsampled to a 75x75 circular icon on every page view. The other two (Trees planted, Hectares restored) are B&W silhouette pictograms ~2-3 KB each.
  
  Designed and shipped a hand-drawn SVG rainforest grove (broadleaf canopy, cacao tree with hanging pod for thematic detail, tall canopy, palm) matching the silhouette-on-white-disc treatment of the existing two icons. Verified visual parity by rendering all three through the same circular clip pipeline and comparing side-by-side.
  
  Wins:
  - Visual consistency: all three Mission icons now read as a coherent B&W set
  - Bandwidth: 10.75 MB JPG -> 2 KB SVG at the icon use (5000x reduction)
  - Crispness: SVG renders sharp at any pixel density
  - Editability: operator can hand-tweak the SVG
  
  The original JPG is intentionally kept in assets/images/ because it is still referenced as the large photographic background of the Brazilian Journey hero card (.journey-card[data-journey='brazilian']::before) — that is a different visual contract (hero photo at large size, not a 75px icon) and the photo is appropriate there.
  
  PR: TrueSightDAO/agroverse_shop_beta#105 (squash-merged ca1d063).
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 50.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
